theme.name: Rookie Quest Sunset Gradient
theme.description: A dark blue-purple fantasy UI system using deep indigo surfaces, white text, subtle pale borders, and a purple-pink-orange sunset gradient for active states, primary actions, selected navigation, and focus highlights.

implementation_status.global_tokens: Protected by the late-loaded responsiveSunsetLayouts.css token lock and app shell rail styles.
known_gaps: Some older docs and component-level styles may still reference coffee, velvet, espresso, leather, parchment, brown-tabletop, or one-off colour treatments.
Each route should be visually checked at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths before calling the rebrand complete.
Screenshots or a preview URL are needed for agent-side visual verification beyond source review.

rules: Use a shared dark blue-purple sunset shell across player, GM, and character-builder pages.
Use the sunset gradient for primary actions and selected states.
Keep unselected rail and tab states quiet, dark, and readable.
Reserve red for destructive actions and errors.
Avoid coffee, velvet, espresso, leather, parchment, brown-tabletop, candlelit, and rustic theme language.
Prefer sharp, minimal cards with readable white text.
